name: SubtitleForge

consumes.description: Reads app.project.activeItem; must be a CompItem. No pre-existing layers need to be selected — the script creates all layers itself.

functions: create a SUBTITLE text layer with Inter-Medium font at 50px
set a timed MarkerValue on the SUBTITLE layer to drive subtitle text via expressions
apply the embedded 'Subtitle Setup' FFX pseudo-effect preset to the SUBTITLE layer
add a 'Enable Type On' Checkbox Control effect to the SUBTITLE layer
create a TXTBox shape layer with a rectangle group (fill, stroke, roundness)
execute Layer Styles commands (3739 + 9000) to enable drop-shadow on TXTBox
set drop-shadow properties on TXTBox via AE Layer Styles API

write AE expressions on SUBTITLE and TXTBox layers that drive text content, font size/color, box size/color/roundness, stroke, fill-opacity, position, layer opacity, and all drop-shadow parameters from the Subtitle Setup effect sliders
wrap all operations in a single undo group named 'SubtitleForge'

scriptSim.scenario: success — creates SUBTITLE text layer and TXTBox shape layer in active comp
scriptSim.inputs: Active CompItem 'Subtitle Comp' (1920×1080, 15 s, 24 fps); no pre-existing layers; no layer selection

sim.note: Sweeps comp time to show when marker windows are active and subtitle text appears

expressions.target: SUBTITLE/ADBE Text Properties/ADBE Text Animators/ADBE Text Animator/ADBE Text Selectors/ADBE Text Selector/ADBE Text Percent Start

sim.note: Sweeps time; when Enable Type On checkbox is 1 and a marker exists at t=0.1, animates Percent Start 0→100 over marker.duration/5
Plots layer opacity as Font Opacity slider is swept 0→100

expressions.target: TXTBox/ADBE Root Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Group/ADBE Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Shape - Rect/ADBE Vector Rect Size

sim.note: Sweeps time to sample sourceRectAtTime of SUBTITLE; box size tracks text bounding rect plus Offset X/Y padding

expressions.target: TXTBox/ADBE Root Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Group/ADBE Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Shape - Rect/ADBE Vector Rect Roundness

sim.note: Plots rect roundness as Box Roundness slider is swept 0→100

expressions.target: TXTBox/ADBE Root Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Group/ADBE Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Graphic - Stroke/ADBE Vector Stroke Color

sim.note: Color read-through — returns RGB array from Stroke Color param at each time step

expressions.target: TXTBox/ADBE Root Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Group/ADBE Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Graphic - Stroke/ADBE Vector Stroke Width

sim.note: Returns 0 when Stroke toggle is off; otherwise plots Stroke Width slider 0→20

expressions.target: TXTBox/ADBE Root Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Group/ADBE Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Graphic - Fill/ADBE Vector Fill Color

sim.note: Color read-through — returns RGB array from Box Color param at each time step

expressions.target: TXTBox/ADBE Root Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Group/ADBE Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Graphic - Fill/ADBE Vector Fill Opacity

sim.note: Plots box fill opacity as Opacity slider is swept 0→100
Sweeps time to show TXTBox position tracking SUBTITLE bounding rect center
Returns 100 when inside a SUBTITLE marker window, 0 otherwise — sweeps time to show box visibility gating
Color read-through — returns RGB array from Shadow Color param at each time step
Returns 0 when Shadow toggle is off; otherwise plots Shadow Opacity slider 0→100
Plots drop-shadow angle as Angle slider is swept 0→360 degrees
Plots drop-shadow distance as Distance slider is swept 0→50 pixels
Plots drop-shadow spread (choke matte) as Spread slider is swept 0→100
Plots drop-shadow blur (size) as Size slider is swept 0→100 pixels

notes: HEADLESS: no ScriptUI dialog — runs immediately on the active comp with zero user interaction.
The 'Subtitle Setup' effect is a pseudo-effect applied from an embedded FFX binary (subtitleControllerFFX) written to Folder.temp at runtime; the binary encodes all slider/color/checkbox params.
Subtitle text is driven entirely by MarkerValue comments on the SUBTITLE layer — add markers with comment text to display subtitles.
The 'Enable Type On' Checkbox Control effect toggles the type-on animation; when unchecked, ADBE Text Percent Start returns its static value.
app.executeCommand(3739) is a workaround for a CC2017–CC2020 bug where Layer Styles would not apply unless triggered via command first.
AE globals required at runtime: ParagraphJustification, PropertyValueType, KeyframeEase, KeyframeInterpolationType, MarkerValue — these are unavailable in the sandbox without stubs.
Fixture confidence is 'medium' because the FFX binary application path (Folder.temp write + applyPreset) and Layer Styles command workaround cannot be fully simulated in the test sandbox.
